title: Peter and Stewie's CI/CD Crash Course

dialogue.line: Hey Stewie, what’s all this CI/CD jazz everyone’s buzzing about?
Think of it like a well-oiled pizza assembly line, Peter.
Oh, I’m listening! Does it come with extra pepperoni?
CI/CD stands for Continuous Integration and Continuous Deployment.
It automates building, testing, and deploying software.
Developers integrate code frequently; improvements get delivered faster.
So, like getting pizza to my mouth faster! Got it.
Precisely, Peter. Companies like Netflix use it to update features quickly.
Does it come with extra pepperoni, though?
Only if you integrate it properly, you doughy simpleton.
